home_loading_policy.rule_zh: 首頁只載入首屏必要批次；其餘資料保留在延後批次，避免手機一次載入過量資料。
home_loading_policy.rule_en: The home page loads only the first essential batches; the remaining records stay in deferred batches to keep mobile browsing fast.
